channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Argentina's World Cup Return and the Auction of the 'Hand of God' Ball
item.description: Argentina's historic return to the FIFA World Cup finals has sparked renewed interest in a iconic piece of football history—the 'Hand of God' ball from the 1986 World Cup. This controversial ball, fam...

item.title: Canadian man faces legal consequences for carrying ADHD medication abroad
item.description: A Canadian man from British Columbia was arrested in Georgia after authorities seized his ADHD medication, leading to a fine and legal complications. The incident highlights the risks of traveling int...

item.title: Universal Robina Corporation's Filipino Snacks Gain Recognition in Hong Kong Markets
item.description: Universal Robina Corporation (URC), the parent company of the popular Filipino snack brand Jack ‘n Jill, has garnered significant recognition in Hong Kong for its localized snack products. The company...

item.title: Zanzibar addresses contractor delays in projects
item.description: The article discusses Zanzibar's recent warnings to construction companies regarding delays in key infrastructure projects. Officials have emphasized the need for timely completion of initiatives like...

item.title: Lucas Herbert leads British Open leaderboard after strong opening rounds, with Cameron John and Adam Scott also in contention
item.description: Lucas Herbert, a Victorian golfer, has surged to the top of the British Open leaderboard after a strong performance at Royal Birkdale. His fellow Australians, including Cameron John and Adam Scott, ar...

item.title: Economic Growth Slows Amid Rising Inflation
item.description: The article discusses the recent economic slowdown in the country, with GDP growth dropping to 5% in the second quarter of 2026. This decline is attributed to rising inflation, which reached a six-mon...

item.title: Federal Minister Considers Ranches for Conservation Targets Amid Alberta-Ottawa Dispute
item.description: The Canadian federal environment minister has suggested that private working ranches in Alberta could be counted toward meeting the government's land-conservation targets under a new environmental str...

item.title: Market Analysis: Key Tech and Retail Stocks Show Mixed Performance
item.description: The stock market experienced mixed performance on July 17, 2026, with key tech and retail companies showing varied results. Intel faced pressure due to supply chain challenges impacting its semiconduc...

item.title: Two convicted killers sentenced to life imprisonment for murder of former Centlec CEO
item.description: The Bloemfontein High Court has sentenced two men to life imprisonment for the murder of Andries Mgoqi, a former Centlec chief executive officer. Nkwebe Seatile and Tlotlisang Monyane were convicted f...

item.title: Pakistan and China to Strengthen Cooperation on Immigration and Border Security
item.description: Pakistan and China have agreed to enhance collaboration on immigration, border management, and institutional cooperation during a high-level meeting between Pakistani Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi an...

item.title: Trader Charged With Fraud And Threats Over N10.12m Business Dispute In Ondo
item.description: A 36-year-old trader, Titus Ishaya, has been taken to court over claims he defrauded business partners of N10.12 million and threatened them after they asked for a refund. The case is in Akure, Ondo S...

item.title: Mistik Studios blends Indigenous culture with gaming through Kitch Witch
item.description: Mistik Studios, an Indigenous and queer-led game development studio based in Saskatchewan, is creating Kitch Witch, a game that merges Indigenous cultural elements with simulation gameplay. The projec...

item.title: PM Modi launches BJP's Punjab poll campaign with sharp attack on AAP, Congress and Akali Dal
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi launched a strong political attack on the ruling Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) in Punjab while addressing public rallies in Jalandhar and Chandigarh, signalling the beginning of t...

item.title: Sen. Lacson criticizes China's racist portrayal of Filipinos in AI-generated video
item.description: Senator Panfilo 'Ping' Lacson criticized China's racist portrayal of Filipinos in an AI-generated video released by China Daily, which depicted Filipinos as monkeys. Lacson argued that such depictions...

item.title: Robbie Williams, Nicole Scherzinger, and Laura Pausini to Perform 'Desire' at FIFA World Cup Closing Ceremony
item.description: Robbie Williams has released a new version of the Official Fifa Anthem 'Desire', featuring Nicole Scherzinger and Laura Pausini, ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup Final. The collaboration marks the fir...

item.title: Pakistan and Kuwait Negotiate Expanded Defence Cooperation
item.description: Pakistan and Kuwait are in early-stage negotiations for an expanded defence pact, reportedly tied to energy cooperation and investment. The talks, according to Reuters, involve Kuwait seeking a show o...

item.title: Federal Govt Launches Textile Sector Revival Plan to Boost Jobs and Exports in Kaduna
item.description: The Nigerian federal government has unveiled a comprehensive plan to revitalize the struggling textile industry, focusing on Kaduna's Kakuri textile hub. The initiative, part of the National Cotton Te...

item.title: Irom Sharmila urges collective support for Sonam Wangchuck's hunger strike against exam reforms
item.description: Irom Sharmila, a Manipur activist who fasted for 16 years to repeal the Armed Forces (Special Powers) Act, is urging widespread support for Sonam Wangchuck's hunger strike against exam reforms and the...

item.title: Royal Commission's Role in Addressing Antisemitism and Social Cohesion
item.description: The article discusses the Royal Commission into Antisemitism and Social Cohesion, highlighting concerns about its own role in exacerbating antisemitism and social divisions. Commissioner Virginia Bell...

item.title: Witness K charged in R15m precious stones theft investigation
item.description: A former Ekurhuleni Metropolitan Police Department (EMPD) official, identified as Witness K, has been arrested in connection with an alleged R15m precious stones theft that occurred during a 2023 raid...
